WAERYN

The wound is the world.
Most people walk past it. You didn't.

The same wound expressed oppositely.

· 01 · THE ANCHOR ·
WISTA
Luminous · Open · The Entry
She gives everyone access
to what she cannot feel herself.
Warmth with nowhere to land.
Empathy
Presence
Reach
· 02 · THE CONVICTION ·
CAEL
Precise · Controlled · The Obsession
She feels everything.
She treats it as information, not instruction.
Cold precision over open wound.
Control
Depth
Conviction
· 03 · THE KINETIC ·
ZEV
Faction Engine · Depth Trap
He walked into the room like he owned it — not because he thought he did, but because ownership had never occurred to him as a relevant question.
The warmth that never stays long enough.
Kinetic
Presence
Reach
· 04 · THE WEIGHTED ·
DOREN
Entry Point · Depth Trap
He said yes. He smiled when he said it.
The smile was real. He has thought about that question every day since.
The most reliable person who has never processed anything that happened to him.
Endurance
Weight
Trust
· 05 · THE REBUILT ·
LUNE
Faction Engine · Depth Trap
"I am exactly what I decided to be."
She thought about the question for three days.
She did not find an answer she was willing to give.
Beautiful. Will cut you if you touch it wrong.
Precision
Control
Mystery
· 06 · THE HONEST ·
ZURI
Faction Engine · Community Magnet
"You didn't have to say that."
"I know. That's why I did."
Honest so long it's worn through the surface.
Honesty
Presence
Edge
· 07 · THE ENIGMA ·
CAER
Community Magnet · Depth Trap
"Nothing you aren't already imagining."
The person spent three weeks deciding what that meant.
The mask hides nothing. That is the unsettling part.
Unknown
